cases.expectedOutcome: Generated runtime report surfaces exercised pair-pause and standby-chain disable state, with matching persisted control snapshots and append-only trace records.
Generated anchor evidence records publish-paused and recovery-only transitions, and the final runtime posture denies new roots while keeping replay state explicit.
Generated settlement evidence records dispatch-paused and refund-only transitions, and the final runtime report blocks new dispatch while refund-first recovery remains active.

cases.command: pnpm --dir contracts devnet:smoke && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/arc-settle-runtime CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo test -p arc-settle --test runtime_devnet -- --nocapture
cases.expectedOutcome: The local end-to-end lane keeps contract, anchor, settlement, and observation evidence aligned.

cases.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/arc-control-plane-verify CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo test -p arc-control-plane web3_evidence -- --test-threads=1 && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/arc-kernel-verify CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo test -p arc-kernel web3_evidence -- --test-threads=1
cases.expectedOutcome: Web3-enabled deployments fail closed without local durable receipt storage, checkpoint issuance, and kernel-signed checkpoint support.
